1. ut-√kṛt (ud-√kṛt) P. -kṛntati, to cut out or off, tear out or off;
to cut up, cut in pieces, carve, butcher,  ŚBr. ;  Mn. ;  Yājñ. ;  MBh. ;  Ragh.  &c.;
to destroy, ruin, extirpate:
Pass. -kṛtyate, to perish,  AitBr. vi, 23, 7.

results.rendered_html:
utkṛt 6 P.
1 To cut out or off, tear out or off; tatminrāmaśarotkṛtte bale  R. 12. 49 ;  Ms. 11. 105 ;  Y. 3. 259. 
2 To cut to pieces, cut up, hack, butcher; utkṛtyotkṛtya kṛttiṃ  Māl. 5. 16.
